description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender, cylindrical pole with a slightly wider base for stability. At the top, it supports a lantern-style lamp head with a multi-faceted, tapered design and vertical bars, reminiscent of classic Victorian street lighting. The lamp head is capped with a small, domed finial, adding a subtle decorative touch. The entire structure appears to be made of metal, likely cast iron or steel, and is finished in a uniform dark color. The design is utilitarian yet elegant, suitable for urban streets, parks, or historical neighborhoods. There are no visible attachments, signage, or additional fixtures on the pole.
description: A tall, slender lamppost with a classic lantern-style lamp head and a dark, metallic finish, featuring subtle decorative elements at the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, lantern head, and vertical bars clearly.
description_view_1: Side view with the same silhouette, highlighting the pole's straightness and the lamp head's symmetry.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the lantern head and pole visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the straight pole and lantern head, mirroring the other side.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Victorian lantern-style with a faceted, tapered shape and vertical bars, topped with a domed finial.
